# proxmox_backup_server_datastore (Resource)

Manages a Proxmox Backup Server datastore configuration via `/config/datastore`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "proxmox_backup_server_datastore" "example" {
  name = "backup"
  path = "/mnt/datastore/backup"

  gc_schedule    = "daily"
  prune_schedule = "daily"
  keep_daily     = 7
  keep_weekly    = 4
  keep_monthly   = 6
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Datastore name.
- `path` (String) Absolute path to the datastore directory, or relative on-device path for removable datastores.

### Optional

- `backend` (String) Datastore backend config.
- `backing_device` (String) UUID of the filesystem partition for removable datastores.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `counter_reset_schedule` (String) Reset notification threshold counters at the specified calendar event schedule.
- `gc_on_unmount` (Boolean) Run garbage collection before unmounting a removable datastore.
- `gc_schedule` (String) Run garbage collection job at the specified calendar event schedule.
- `keep_daily` (Number) Number of daily backups to keep.
- `keep_hourly` (Number) Number of hourly backups to keep.
- `keep_last` (Number) Number of backups to keep.
- `keep_monthly` (Number) Number of monthly backups to keep.
- `keep_weekly` (Number) Number of weekly backups to keep.
- `keep_yearly` (Number) Number of yearly backups to keep.
- `maintenance_mode` (String) Maintenance mode in Proxmox Backup Server property-string format, for example `type=read-only,message=maintenance`.
- `notification_mode` (String) Notification mode, either `legacy-sendmail` or `notification-system`.
- `notification_thresholds` (String) Notification threshold settings in Proxmox Backup Server property-string format.
- `notify` (String) Datastore notification settings in Proxmox Backup Server property-string format, for example `gc=error,prune=always`.
- `notify_user` (String) User ID for legacy sendmail notifications.
- `overwrite_in_use` (Boolean) Overwrite in-use marker during creation for S3-backed datastores.
- `prune_schedule` (String) Run prune job at the specified calendar event schedule.
- `reuse_datastore` (Boolean) Re-use an existing datastore directory during creation.
- `tuning` (String) Datastore tuning options in Proxmox Backup Server property-string format.
- `verify_new` (Boolean) Verify new backups right after completion.
